name: Pecan Pie Bars (Without Crust)
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Prepare an 8x8 square pan by spraying it with Bakers Joy.
2 In a mixing bowl, combine the pecan pie muffin mix, beaten eggs, and melted butter. Stir until all ingredients are well blended.
3 Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and bake for 20 minutes or until set.
4 Allow the bars to cool completely before cutting them into small pieces.
Note: You can typically find the muffin mix at any Walmart store, though it may not be available year-round.
